commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 33:21 Amon was two and twenty years old when he began to reign, and reigned two years in Jerusalem. Hebrew, "camp. The Jews pretend that he was deprived of his beard and hair, (St. Jerome, Trad. ) misapplying the text of Isaias vii. (Calmet) Sword, to prevent their being offered as victims, to appease the idol and the people. Solomon) (Lyranus) This happened some months after the king's return to Ninive, when he had cruelly oppressed the captive Jews and Tobias, i.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
